description: Frozen MyGene.info query responses for the 50 NB12 uncovered LoF genes (no NB10 network direction call). One entry per gene symbol; each value is the verbatim {took, total, max_score, hits:[...]} response. Used to resolve each gene's Swiss-Prot UniProt accession for the downstream QuickGO pull (notebook Step 3).
gene_list_source: data/processed/nb12_direction_law_expanded.csv, rows where regulator_call is NaN (the 50-gene expansion target defined in notebook cell 6)
